<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Kochi Yosakoi Matsuri]][[id:Festival Yosakoi]][[ja:„āą„Āē„Āď„ĀĄÁ•≠„āä]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Kochi Yosakoi Matsuri]][[id:Festival Yosakoi]][[ja:„āą„Āē„Āď„ĀĄÁ•≠„āä]]
{{Expand Japanese|„āą„Āē„Āď„ĀĄÁ•≠„āä|date=November 2025}}
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[id:Festival Yosakoi]][[ja:„āą„Āē„Āď„ĀĄÁ•≠„āä]]
[[ja:„āą„Āē„Āď„ĀĄÁ•≠„āä]]
[[ja:„āą„Āē„Āď„ĀĄÁ•≠„āä]]

== 2025-05-18 07:44 ==

[[Summer Matsuri]] linked to {{ill|Yosakoi Festival|ja|„āą„Āē„Āď„ĀĄÁ•≠„āä|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yosakoi Festival|1=YOSAKOI Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11255132}}
[[id:Festival Yosakoi]]
[[id:Festival Yosakoi]]
[[id:Festival Yosakoi]]
{{commonscat|Category:Kochi Yosakoi Matsuri}}

{{translated page|ja|„āą„Āē„Āď„ĀĄÁ•≠„āä|version=103899872|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{wikidata link|Q11255132}}
[[Category:Dance_festivals_in_Japan]]
[[Category:Festivals in Kochi Prefecture]]
[[Category:History_of_Kochi,_Kochi]]
[[Category:Recurring_events_established_in_1954]]
[[Category:Street_culture]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
